title: Dempsey Construction — Meeting Prep & Procore Integration Research
markdown:
# Dempsey Construction — Meeting Prep

## Intake Form Summary

### Respondent 1: Merissa Fruin — Senior Project Coordinator
- **Team size:** Not specified
- **Active projects:** 25–50
- **Storage:** Shared drive ("We keep all of our documents on a drive")
- **PM Platform:** Procore
- **AI tools in use:** ChatGPT+, BuildCheck, BuildSync, Ivo (contract reviews), Monday.com (CRM)
- **ChatGPT Enterprise:** No, but interested
- **Biggest pain point:** "Simply finding accurate information!"
- **Docs searched most:** Plans/drawings, Specs, RFIs, Submittals, Contracts/change orders, Daily reports/logs, Photos

### Respondent 2: Drew — Director of Project Management
- **Team size:** Under 50
- **Active projects:** 10–25
- **Storage:** Server + Procore
- **PM Platform:** Procore
- **AI tools in use:** None for construction workflows
- **ChatGPT Enterprise:** Yes
- **Biggest pain point:** "Plan change through Submittals/RFIs"
- **Docs searched most:** Plans/drawings, Specs, RFIs, Submittals, Photos

---

## Key Observations

### They're a Great Fit
1. **Pain points match exactly** — both struggle with finding information and tracking changes across RFIs/submittals
2. **They're on Procore** — different from GCI (ACC), but same integration pattern
3. **Drew has ChatGPT Enterprise** — zero additional licensing cost
4. **Merissa is already AI-savvy** — uses 5 AI tools, will be a power user and internal champion
5. **They search for the same doc types as GCI** — plans, specs, RFIs, submittals, photos

### Differences from GCI
| | GCI | Dempsey |
|---|---|---|
| **PM Platform** | ACC (Autodesk) | Procore |
| **File Storage** | Egnyte | Shared drive / Server |
| **ChatGPT Enterprise** | Yes | Yes (Drew), Interested (Merissa) |
| **AI Maturity** | Low | Mixed (Drew: low, Merissa: high) |
| **Team Size** | ~100 | Under 50 |

### Storage Question to Clarify
Merissa says "a drive," Drew says "Server / Procore." Need to clarify: network file server? NAS? Google Drive? OneDrive? This determines the Phase 2 integration.

---

## Capability Breakdown — What Data Scout Can Do

### Phase 1: Procore Structured Data (✅ Available Now)

| Capability | What Users Can Do | Example Query |
|---|---|---|
| **RFIs** | Search, filter, discuss full details — status, assignees, responses, linked items | "Show me all open RFIs on the Elm Street project" |
| **Submittals** | Search by status, spec section, reviewer, due date | "Which submittals are overdue on Project X?" |
| **Daily Logs** | 15+ log types — manpower, equipment, weather, deliveries, notes, etc. | "What was the weather and manpower count last Tuesday on the Main St job?" |
| **Specs** | Browse by section, revision | "What spec section covers concrete mix requirements?" |
| **Change Orders** | Search by amounts, status, reasons | "Show me all pending change orders over $50K" |
| **Drawings/Plans** | Browse by set, revision, area — metadata + download links | "What's the latest revision of the foundation plan?" |
| **Photos** | Browse by category | "Show me recent photos from the site inspection" |
| **Documents** | Navigate folder structure, get download links | "Find the geotechnical report in Project X" |
| **Cross-reference** | Correlate across all data types | "Show me RFIs that reference structural changes and their related submittals" |

### Phase 1 Limitations (❌ Not Yet Available)

| Limitation | What This Means | Future Solution |
|---|---|---|
| **No full-text search inside PDFs** | Can find and link to a file, but can't read its contents | Procore Agentic APIs (coming soon) |
| **No document content discussion** | Can't answer "what does page 3 of this spec say?" | Agentic APIs or file storage integration |
| **No shared drive search** | Files on their separate drive/server aren't covered | Phase 2 integration (platform TBD) |

### Phase 2: File Content Search (Future)
Depends on one of:
- **Procore Agentic APIs** — GA targeted for late March 2026. Would add deep search across PDFs, images, and videos directly in Procore.
- **File storage integration** — Like Egnyte was for GCI. Depends on what platform "the drive" actually is.

### The Pitch
> **Phase 1:** "Ask Data Scout 'show me all RFIs on the Elm Street project that reference structural changes' and get instant answers."
>
> **Phase 2:** "Ask Data Scout 'what does section 3.2 of this spec say about concrete mix requirements?' and get the answer from inside the document."

---

## Merissa's AI Tools — Context for the Meeting

| Tool | What It Does | Overlap with Data Scout? |
|---|---|---|
| **BuildCheck** | AI design review — analyzes 2D drawings to detect errors, omissions, coordination issues across all disciplines. Pre-construction focus. $5.9M raised, 50+ customers. | **None.** Pre-construction tool. Data Scout is for finding info during construction. |
| **BuildSync** | AI submittal review — extracts specs from submittals, verifies compliance, detects drawing changes between revisions. Integrates with Procore. | **Complementary.** BuildSync reviews submittals; Data Scout finds them. |
| **Ivo** | AI contract redlining — reviews agreements against playbooks in Microsoft Word. 97% accuracy, 75% time savings. General legal tool, not construction-specific. | **None.** Different use case entirely. |
| **Monday.com** | CRM — managing client/vendor relationships. | **None.** CRM, not project data search. |

**Key talking point:** Data Scout complements all of these tools. It's the "find anything across all your project data" layer that sits underneath their specialized tools.

---

## Procore Integration — Technical Feasibility

### Summary: Feasible ✅
- API covers all needed resources (RFIs, submittals, drawings, daily logs, photos, specs, change orders, documents)
- OAuth 2.0 compatible with ChatGPT Actions
- Free developer account + sandbox with seed data
- Estimated effort: ~20-30 hours

### Procore Agentic APIs — Watch Item
- Announced for late Q1 2026 (i.e. now)
- Would add: semantic search across PDFs/images/videos, MCP support, RAG-optimized endpoints
- Currently in testing, early access signups available
- **Strategy:** Build Phase 1 on REST API now; upgrade to Agentic APIs when available

### Notable: Trunk Tools Removed
Trunk Tools (main AI competitor in this space, $149/user/mo) was removed from Procore API access. The competitive field is wide open.

---

## Pricing & Payment

### Structure
- **Phase 1:** $10,000 fixed price — Procore structured data integration
- **Phase 2:** TBD — File content search (scope depends on storage platform + Agentic API availability)

### Payment Terms
- **50% upfront ($5,000)** — covers development environment setup and API integration build
- **50% on delivery ($5,000)** — invoiced when working in their Procore environment and team has validated

### How to Frame It
> "Our standard terms are 50% to kick off, 50% on delivery. The upfront portion covers the development environment setup and API integration build. Once it's working in your Procore environment and your team has validated it, we invoice the remainder."

### Value Comparison
- Trunk Tools etc.: ~$149/user/month → $7,450/month for a 50-person team → $89,400/year
- Data Scout: $10,000 one-time + runs on their existing ChatGPT Enterprise subscription
- **ROI story:** Pays for itself in 6 weeks vs. the per-user alternative

---

## Suggested Meeting Agenda (30 min)

### 1. Introductions & Context (5 min)
- Brief intro to Sagemind AI
- Acknowledge their intake responses — show we did our homework

### 2. Understand Their World (10 min)
- Clarify the storage setup ("the drive" — what platform?)
- How do they use Procore day-to-day? Which modules most?
- Walk through a real scenario: "When you need to find a spec revision tied to an RFI, what do you do today?"
- Ask about Merissa's experience with BuildCheck/BuildSync/Ivo — what works, what doesn't?

### 3. Demo / Explain the Solution (10 min)
- Explain how Data Scout works (natural language → instant answers from project data)
- Show the Procore capability map: RFIs, submittals, daily logs, drawings, specs, change orders, photos
- Emphasize: runs inside their existing ChatGPT Enterprise — no new platform
- Position as complementary to BuildCheck/BuildSync/Ivo

### 4. Address Their Pain Points (5 min)
- **Merissa:** "Finding accurate information" → Data Scout searches across all project data types instantly
- **Drew:** "Plan changes through submittals/RFIs" → Data Scout correlates RFIs with drawing revisions, shows submittal status alongside plan changes

### 5. Scope, Pricing & Next Steps (5 min)
- Phase 1: Procore integration — $10K, 50/50 payment terms
- Phase 2: File content search — future scope, mention Procore's upcoming AI APIs
- Next steps: Procore admin access, identify pilot users, schedule follow-up
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks for Phase 1

---

## Open Questions for the Meeting
1. What is "the drive"? (Network server, Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Box?)
2. Does someone on the team have Procore admin access? (Needed to authorize our app)
3. Are all project types similar, or different workflows for different project types?
4. Who would be the pilot users? (Merissa = natural champion)
5. What's their timeline/urgency? Any upcoming projects where this is especially valuable?
6. Does the whole team have ChatGPT Enterprise, or just Drew? (Determines rollout scope)
7. Is the Monday.com CRM relevant to project data, or separate?
